theme: parade every clan once with no repeated banner-gap
title: Parade of the Two-Ring Clans
strategies: canonical baseline: march the clans in plain lexicographic (house, guild) order

sequencing-only greedy: single deterministic pass, at each step append the unused clan that gives a brand-new cumulative drift, ignoring the banner-gap term entirely (the textbook 'sequenceable group' construction)

Sylow-2 regime detection + joint exchange search: classify G=Z_n1 x Z_n2 by whether its 2-part is trivial, cyclic-nontrivial, or non-cyclic (Hall-Paige/Gordon-type obstruction), derive the true achievable ceiling for drift-count + gap-count, and run bounded seeded restarts of a two-criterion greedy (each step prefers a clan that is simultaneously drift-new AND gap-new) stopping as soon as the regime-derived ceiling is reached
